description: Hydropathy profile analysis and domain architecture comparison for Mtpalpha vs HADHA vs EHHADH
code:
import requests
import numpy as np
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Fetch Mtpalpha sequence
url = "https://rest.uniprot.org/uniprotkb/Q8IPE8.fasta"
resp = requests.get(url)
lines = resp.text.strip().split('\n')
seq = ''.join(lines[1:])

# Kyte-Doolittle hydropathy scale
kd = {
    'A': 1.8, 'R': -4.5, 'N': -3.5, 'D': -3.5, 'C': 2.5,
    'Q': -3.5, 'E': -3.5, 'G': -0.4, 'H': -3.2, 'I': 4.5,
    'L': 3.8, 'K': -3.9, 'M': 1.9, 'F': 2.8, 'P': -1.6,
    'S': -0.8, 'T': -0.7, 'W': -0.9, 'Y': -1.3, 'V': 4.2
}

# Calculate hydropathy profile with window of 19
window = 19
hydro = []
for i in range(len(seq) - window + 1):
    segment = seq[i:i+window]
    score = np.mean([kd.get(aa, 0) for aa in segment])
    hydro.append(score)

# N-terminal charge profile (amphipathic helix analysis for MTS)
charge_window = 10
charges = []
for i in range(min(len(seq), 80)):
    aa = seq[i]
    if aa in 'RK':
        charges.append(1)
    elif aa in 'DE':
        charges.append(-1)
    else:
        charges.append(0)

# Create visualization
fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(14, 10))

# Panel 1: Full hydropathy profile
ax1 = axes[0]
positions = range(len(hydro))
ax1.plot(positions, hydro, 'b-', linewidth=0.8)
ax1.axhline(y=0, color='k', linewidth=0.5)
ax1.axhline(y=1.6, color='r', linewidth=0.5, linestyle='--', label='TM threshold (1.6)')
ax1.set_xlabel('Position')
ax1.set_ylabel('Hydropathy Score')
ax1.set_title('Q8IPE8 (Mtpalpha) - Kyte-Doolittle Hydropathy (window=19)')
ax1.legend()
# Annotate C-terminal PTS1
ax1.axvspan(len(hydro)-5, len(hydro), alpha=0.3, color='green', label='PTS1 region')
ax1.text(len(hydro)-3, max(hydro)*0.8, 'PTS1\n(SKL)', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='green', fontweight='bold')

# Panel 2: N-terminal region detail (MTS analysis)
ax2 = axes[1]
n_region = 80
n_hydro = hydro[:n_region]
ax2.plot(range(len(n_hydro)), n_hydro, 'b-', linewidth=1.5)
ax2.axhline(y=0, color='k', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_xlabel('Position')
ax2.set_ylabel('Hydropathy Score')
ax2.set_title('N-terminal Region (first 80 aa) - Mitochondrial Targeting Sequence Analysis')

# Add charge markers
for i, c in enumerate(charges):
    if c > 0:
        ax2.axvline(x=i, color='blue', alpha=0.3, linewidth=2)
    elif c < 0:
        ax2.axvline(x=i, color='red', alpha=0.3, linewidth=2)

ax2.text(0.02, 0.95, 'Blue bars = R/K (+), Red bars = D/E (-)', 
         transform=ax2.transAxes, fontsize=8, va='top', 
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='wheat', alpha=0.5))

# Panel 3: Domain architecture comparison
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.set_xlim(0, 800)
ax3.set_ylim(0, 4)
ax3.set_xlabel('Position (aa)')
ax3.set_title('Domain Architecture Comparison')

# Mtpalpha domains
y_mtp = 3
ax3.barh(y_mtp, 744, left=0, height=0.3, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black')
ax3.text(-30, y_mtp, 'Mtpalpha\n(Dmel)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8)
# ECH domain (approx 1-300 based on InterPro)
ax3.barh(y_mtp, 300, left=10, height=0.3, color='steelblue', alpha=0.7)
ax3.text(160, y_mtp+0.2, 'ECH', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='steelblue')
# 3HCDH NAD-bd domain (336-514)
ax3.barh(y_mtp, 178, left=336, height=0.3, color='coral', alpha=0.7)
ax3.text(425, y_mtp+0.2, '3HCDH NAD-bd', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='coral')
# 3HCDH C-term (517-611)
ax3.barh(y_mtp, 94, left=517, height=0.3, color='salmon', alpha=0.7)
ax3.text(564, y_mtp+0.2, '3HCDH-C', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='salmon')
# PTS1
ax3.plot(741, y_mtp, 'g^', markersize=12)
ax3.text(741, y_mtp-0.25, 'SKL', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='green', fontweight='bold')

# HADHA domains
y_had = 2
ax3.barh(y_had, 763, left=0, height=0.3, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black')
ax3.text(-30, y_had, 'HADHA\n(Human)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8)
ax3.barh(y_had, 36, left=0, height=0.3, color='orange', alpha=0.7)
ax3.text(18, y_had+0.2, 'MTS', ha='center', fontsize=7, color='orange')
ax3.barh(y_had, 300, left=37, height=0.3, color='steelblue', alpha=0.7)
ax3.barh(y_had, 178, left=350, height=0.3, color='coral', alpha=0.7)
ax3.barh(y_had, 94, left=530, height=0.3, color='salmon', alpha=0.7)
# No PTS1
ax3.text(760, y_had-0.25, 'FYQ', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='gray')

# EHHADH domains
y_ehh = 1
ax3.barh(y_ehh, 723, left=0, height=0.3, color='lightgray', edgecolor='black')
ax3.text(-30, y_ehh, 'EHHADH\n(Human)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=8)
ax3.barh(y_ehh, 300, left=10, height=0.3, color='steelblue', alpha=0.7)
ax3.barh(y_ehh, 178, left=350, height=0.3, color='coral', alpha=0.7)
ax3.barh(y_ehh, 94, left=530, height=0.3, color='salmon', alpha=0.7)
# PTS1
ax3.plot(720, y_ehh, 'g^', markersize=12)
ax3.text(720, y_ehh-0.25, 'SKL', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='green', fontweight='bold')

ax3.set_yticks([])

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('mtpalpha_analysis.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved successfully")
